chunks.text:
SGI Netronics — Business Knowledge Base

About the Company

SGI Netronics is a security electronics and systems integration company based in Cochin (Kochi), Kerala, India. The company has over 18 years of experience delivering security and automation solutions to homes, businesses, offices, hospitals, hotels, schools, and industrial facilities across Kerala and beyond.

hospitals, hotels, schools, and industrial facilities across Kerala and beyond.

SGI Netronics is a trusted name for CCTV surveillance, biometric access control, alarm systems, home automation, video door phones, networking, and fire safety solutions.

Contact Information

Phone: +91 9656 069 703 / +91 9747 554 459
Email: sales@sginetronics.com
Address: Ernakulam, Cochin — 682 036, Kerala, India
Website: https://www.sginetronics.com

Products and Services

036, Kerala, India
Website: https://www.sginetronics.com

Products and Services

CCTV Surveillance Systems
Supply, installation, and maintenance of CCTV camera systems for homes, offices, shops, warehouses, factories, hospitals, and outdoor areas. Solutions include HD and 4K IP cameras, dome cameras, bullet cameras, PTZ cameras, night-vision and IR cameras, analog (HDCVI/AHD) and IP-based NVR/DVR systems, remote monitoring via mobile app, and outdoor weatherproof cameras.

DVR systems, remote monitoring via mobile app, and outdoor weatherproof cameras.

Biometric Access Control
Fingerprint and face-recognition based access control systems for offices, factories, and secure facilities. Products include fingerprint attendance machines, face recognition terminals, RFID card-based access control, door access controllers with electric locks, and time and attendance software integration.

s controllers with electric locks, and time and attendance software integration.

Access Control Systems
Electronic door access and gate management solutions: RFID card readers and proximity readers, electromagnetic locks and electric strikes, barrier gates and boom barriers, turnstile gates, and intercom integration.

kes, barrier gates and boom barriers, turnstile gates, and intercom integration.

Intruder Alarm and Burglar Alarm Systems
Detection and alerting systems to protect premises: motion sensors (PIR), door and window magnetic contact sensors, glass break detectors, siren and strobe alerts, GSM dialers for SMS and call alerts, and central monitoring integration.

alerts, GSM dialers for SMS and call alerts, and central monitoring integration.

Home Automation
Smart home and office automation solutions: lighting control (scene setting, dimming, scheduling), curtain and blind motor control, smart switches and touch panels, integration with voice assistants, mobile app-based remote control, and air conditioning and appliance automation.

mobile app-based remote control, and air conditioning and appliance automation.

Video Door Phones and Intercoms
Video and audio intercom systems for apartments, villas, offices, and gated communities: wired and wireless video door phones, colour video door phone panels, multi-apartment intercom systems, and IP video door phones with remote unlock.

, multi-apartment intercom systems, and IP video door phones with remote unlock.

Fire Alarm Systems
Life safety fire detection and alarm solutions: conventional and addressable fire alarm panels, smoke detectors, heat detectors, manual call points, hooters and sounders, and integration with building management systems.

points, hooters and sounders, and integration with building management systems.

Networking and Structured Cabling
IT and networking infrastructure: network switches and routers (CISCO, D-Link, TP-Link), structured LAN cabling (Cat5e, Cat6), Wi-Fi access points and wireless networking, server room setup and rack installation.

access points and wireless networking, server room setup and rack installation.

Electric Fencing
Perimeter security using energised electric fences: high-security electric fence energisers, perimeter detection and alarm integration, suitable for industrial plots, farms, and villas.

Brands Supplied and Installed

suitable for industrial plots, farms, and villas.

Brands Supplied and Installed

SGI Netronics works with leading international and Indian brands including Hikvision, Dahua, CP Plus, and Bosch for CCTV; ZKTeco, Suprema, and HID for access control; Agni, Hochiki, Apollo, and Morley for fire alarm; Cisco, D-Link, TP-Link, and Netgear for networking; Legrand, Schneider Electric, and HDL for home automation; and Fermax, Hikvision, and 2N for intercom.

Services Offered

r home automation; and Fermax, Hikvision, and 2N for intercom.

Services Offered

Free Site Survey: SGI Netronics offers free on-site surveys to assess security requirements and recommend the right solution.
Design and Consultation: System design tailored to client budget and needs.
Supply and Installation: End-to-end supply, installation, and commissioning.
Annual Maintenance Contracts (AMC): Post-installation service contracts to ensure systems remain operational. AMC includes periodic servicing, fault diagnosis, and priority support.
Repair and Servicing: Repair of existing CCTV, alarm, and access control systems irrespective of brand.
Remote Support: Troubleshooting via phone and remote access for networked systems.

mote Support: Troubleshooting via phone and remote access for networked systems.

Pricing Approach

SGI Netronics provides customised quotes based on specific project requirements — number of cameras, area covered, type of system, cabling requirements, and brand preference all affect pricing. Clients are encouraged to request a free site survey and quotation.

ect pricing. Clients are encouraged to request a free site survey and quotation.

Entry-level CCTV packages for home or small shop typically start from Rs 8,000 to Rs 15,000 depending on cameras and DVR. Biometric attendance systems start from Rs 5,000 for standalone units. Fire alarm systems are quoted per panel and number of zones. AMC contracts are priced per site depending on scope of systems covered. All prices are subject to change — contact SGI Netronics for current pricing and project quotes.

ubject to change — contact SGI Netronics for current pricing and project quotes.

Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Do you offer free site surveys? Yes, SGI Netronics provides free site surveys in and around Kochi and Ernakulam. Contact us to schedule one.

Q: Do you install for residential customers? Yes, SGI Netronics serves both residential and commercial clients, from a single home to large housing complexes.

sidential and commercial clients, from a single home to large housing complexes.

Q: Can you service or maintain systems installed by other companies? Yes, SGI Netronics services and repairs CCTV, alarm, and access control systems from any brand or installer.

Q: Do you provide systems outside Kochi? Yes, SGI Netronics serves clients across Kerala and can discuss outstation projects.

SGI Netronics serves clients across Kerala and can discuss outstation projects.

Q: What is an AMC? An Annual Maintenance Contract ensures your security systems are regularly serviced and faults are fixed quickly. It gives peace of mind that your investment is protected.

Q: Can I view my CCTV cameras on my mobile phone? Yes. Modern IP and HD-analog DVR/NVR systems allow remote viewing on iOS and Android devices via dedicated apps such as Hik-Connect and gDMSS.

ing on iOS and Android devices via dedicated apps such as Hik-Connect and gDMSS.

Q: How many cameras do I need for my home? It depends on your property layout. A typical villa or apartment may need 4 to 8 cameras to cover entry points, parking, and key areas. SGI Netronics will advise during the free site survey.

Project Experience

reas. SGI Netronics will advise during the free site survey.

Project Experience

SGI Netronics has completed security and automation projects for hospitals and clinics (patient safety, access control), hotels and resorts (IP CCTV, room automation), schools and colleges (attendance systems, campus security), apartments and residential complexes (video intercom, CCTV), offices and commercial buildings (access control, networking), factories and warehouses (perimeter security, CCTV), and retail shops and showrooms (surveillance, alarm systems).
